text: When loading the sketch tab, the "Discuss" sidebar should just start scrolled to the bottom - no scrolling animation

proposedTasks.title: Disable scroll animation on Discuss sidebar initial load
proposedTasks.description:
When the Sketch tab's Discuss sidebar mounts (or conversation messages finish loading), scroll the message list container to the bottom instantly (scrollTop = scrollHeight, or scrollIntoView with behavior: 'instant') instead of using a smooth-scroll animation. Acceptance criteria:
- On first render of the Discuss sidebar, the view is already at the latest message with no visible scrolling motion.
- When switching back to the Sketch tab from another tab, the sidebar again appears pre-scrolled to the bottom.
- Smooth scrolling is still used when new messages arrive after the initial load (user expectation for live chat).

taskTitles: Disable scroll animation on Discuss sidebar initial load
